testcase.name: KanbanBoard DEMAND_BADGES maps every key to canonical fp-badge-*
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/KanbanBoard.tsx" exists...............passed When I read the source of "src/components/KanbanBoard.tsx"..................passed Then the source should contain the pattern "rising: { label: 'Hot', className: 'fp-badge fp-badge-red' }"..passed And the source should contain the pattern "high: { label: 'Active', className: 'fp-badge fp-badge-purple' }"..passed And the source should contain the pattern "stable: { label: 'Steady', className: 'fp-badge fp-badge-blue' }"..passed And the source should contain the pattern "low_liquidity: { label: 'Dead', className: 'fp-badge fp-badge-yellow' }"..passed And the raw Tailwind palette class count should equal 0.....................passed

testcase.name: Opportunities page header uses canonical fp-glass-nav surface
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "app/opportunities/page.tsx" exists...................passed When I read the source of "app/opportunities/page.tsx"......................passed Then the source should contain the pattern "fp-glass-nav"...................passed And the source should not contain the pattern "backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/10"..passed

testcase.name: Opportunities page stat cards use canonical fp-glow-card with zero palette violations
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "app/opportunities/page.tsx" exists...................passed When I read the source of "app/opportunities/page.tsx"......................passed Then the source should contain the pattern "fp-glow-card"...................passed And the source should not contain the pattern "hover:shadow-blue-500".......passed And the source should not contain the pattern "hover:shadow-orange-500".....passed And the raw Tailwind palette class count should equal 0.....................passed

testcase.name: Listings detail page imports LoadingSkeleton, ErrorBanner, EmptyState from shared ui
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "app/listings/[id]/page.tsx" exists...................passed When I read the source of "app/listings/[id]/page.tsx"......................passed Then the source should contain the pattern "LoadingSkeleton, ErrorBanner, EmptyState"..passed And the source should contain the pattern "errorStatus === 404".............passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-glass"........................passed And the raw Tailwind palette class count should equal 0.....................passed

testcase.name: MessageBubble source ships zero palette classes and zero dark prefixes
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/messages/MessageBubble.tsx" exists....passed When I read the source of "src/components/messages/MessageBubble.tsx".......passed Then the source should not contain the pattern "dark:"......................passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-glass-sm".....................passed And the source should contain the pattern "rgba(124,58,237,0.15)"...........passed And the raw Tailwind palette class count should equal 0.....................passed

testcase.name: STATUS_COLORS entries all return canonical fp-badge class strings
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/lib/message-constants.ts" exists.................passed When I read the source of "src/lib/message-constants.ts"....................passed Then the source should contain the pattern "fp-badge fp-badge-yellow".......passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-badge fp-badge-red"...........passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-badge fp-badge-blue"..........passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-badge fp-badge-gray"..........passed And the source should not contain the pattern "dark:".......................passed And the raw Tailwind palette class count should equal 0.....................passed

testcase.name: Messages page imports EmptyState and has zero palette classes
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "app/messages/page.tsx" exists........................passed When I read the source of "app/messages/page.tsx"...........................passed Then the source should contain the pattern "EmptyState".....................passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-glass"........................passed And the raw Tailwind palette class count should equal 0.....................passed

testcase.name: Thread components ship canonical surfaces with zero palette and zero dark prefixes - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/messages/ThreadItem.tsx" exists.......passed When I read the source of "src/components/messages/ThreadItem.tsx"..........passed Then the source should not contain the pattern "dark:"......................passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-glass-sm".....................passed And the raw Tailwind palette class count should equal 0.....................passed

testcase.name: Thread components ship canonical surfaces with zero palette and zero dark prefixes - #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/messages/ThreadHeader.tsx" exists.....passed When I read the source of "src/components/messages/ThreadHeader.tsx"........passed Then the source should not contain the pattern "dark:"......................passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-glass"........................passed And the raw Tailwind palette class count should equal 0.....................passed

testcase.name: MessageApprovalCard STATUS_COLORS consumer does not double-apply badge padding
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/MessageApprovalCard.tsx" exists.......passed When I read the source of "src/components/MessageApprovalCard.tsx"..........passed Then the source should not contain the pattern "text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-medium ${STATUS_COLORS"..passed And the source should contain the pattern "flex-shrink-0 ${STATUS_COLORS[message.status]"..passed
